name: Jat Kittag
description: Deliver crushing blows with this Grineer built, jet powered mace.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Deliver crushing blows with this Grineer built, jet powered mace.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Balanced the Jat Kittag spark FX for less visual noise.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: A full Visual FX pass has been done for Phase 1! Because this is Phase 1, it 'means all the unique weapons will have new generic FX for a little while (Jat Kittag etc.) until we can get through them all and make new clean variants'.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.2
patchlogs.fixes: More fixes towards wonky looking stretched APEX particles, mostly seen with the Jat Kittag.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Palatine Hammer Skin being equipped backwards on all hammers (except for the Jat Kittag).

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Reduced damage of the Jat Kittag in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.changes: The new Nightwatch Skin Pack will include skins for: Grinlok, Tonkor, Marelok, Brakk, Diriga, Dual Cleavers, Machete and Jat Kittag. Find them in the Market today!

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: The Jat Kittag has received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Weapon skins for the Grinlok, Tonkor, Jat Kittag and Marelok are now available from Teshin!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Jat Kittag’s chosen Energy color not applying properly when in missions.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: The Scindo series, Gram, Galatine, Magistar, Fragor and Jat Kittag have had their damage and Stance damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Jat Kittag Palatine Skin:  Transform the Jat Kittag with this forged steel skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where changes made to Jat Kittag's ground-attack radius in the PvP setting unintentionally affected the PvE weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a number of issues with melee items/weapons that result in radial damage. Radial damage values have been significantly lowered on melee ground attacks, especially for the Galatine, Gram, and Jat Kittag. Exact ranges are as follows:Jat Kittag from 10 meters to 6 meters.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • The Jat Kittag has been enabled for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.11
patchlogs.changes: Increased Sugatra size on Jat Kittag.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Jat Kittag Ground Slam sometimes killing bosses depending on what the boss lands on.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Hotfix 12.3.2 Changes: Changes to the Grustrag Three drop logic, they no longer exhaust everything in their repertoire (mod + part + resource) on death, they now each drop (mod OR part OR resource). Fixes: Fixed Jat Kittag FX reflecting a sweet party on the screen instead of a deadly hammer, sorry, party is over.Fixed issue with endless mission rewards in missions where the Grustrag Three have spawned.Fixed issues with Forest Level walls and collisions.  Fixed Immortal Skin unintentionally overriding Ember Prime’s gold colours.Fixed mods picked up in game not having backgrounds.Fixed Grustrag Bolt removal recipe not being craftable if you only have one Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Jat Kittag animations.12.3.1 Hotfix:

patchlogs.name: Update 12.2.0: Castanas!
patchlogs.changes: Changed Jat Kittag Charge attack FX for new charge animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.1.2
patchlogs.changes: Reverted to the old holster position for Jat Kittag.
